settings.headline: A few people who love oil paint — and your cat.
settings.subline: A small studio painting your companion by hand, in real oil — the way the masters did it.

settings.heading: A photo, a cat, and a chance meeting in Boston
settings.story:
I'm Neo — and before any of this, I was just a guy in Arizona who loved two things: oil painting, and my cat.

In 2024, on a trip to Boston, I spent an afternoon at the Museum of Fine Arts. Standing in front of the same painting were two others who'd travelled a long way to see it — Alex and Lukas, classically trained painters who'd flown in from Germany. We got talking, the way strangers do in front of something beautiful, about where art is heading — digital tools, AI, and what all of it means for something as old and slow as oil on canvas.

Later I sent Alex a photo of my cat. He painted her. When it arrived, it stopped me — and everyone I showed it to. That a real hand and real paint could hold an animal's character in a way no screen ever could — that was the whole idea.

Alex and Lukas brought in two more friends they trust at the easel — Leon and Mia. And that's how Maelin Studio began.

settings.statement: That conversation in Boston became the line we won't cross. Every Maelin portrait is painted by hand, in real oil, by a trained artist — never a print, never AI, never a screen. We'd rather paint slowly and get the likeness right than do it any other way.

settings.name: Alex
settings.bio: Blends classical realism with bold abstract expressionism to turn a beloved pet into timeless, gallery-quality art.

settings.name: Lukas
settings.school: State Academy of Fine Arts Stuttgart
settings.bio: Combines geometric structure with soft textural layers to capture every pet's character in deeply structured, gallery-quality art.

settings.name: Leon
settings.bio: Captures organic colour palettes and soft light to turn your companion into a serene, gallery-quality portrait.

settings.name: Mia
settings.bio: Infuses rich textural depth with meticulous modern brushwork to turn a treasured pet into powerful, gallery-quality art.

settings.intro: A small studio: one cat-obsessed founder and a circle of academy-trained painters who'd rather work slowly than work any other way.
settings.founder_bio: Oil-painting obsessive, lifelong cat person, and the one who answers your emails. Neo started Maelin after a single portrait of his own cat made it impossible to go back to anything a screen could print.

settings.headline: Ready to start your portrait?
settings.subline: No commitment — just pick a size and upload a photo.
